title: BetterArabic
description: A mod that makes the chat in Arabic more pleasant 'connected letters'
body:
Better Arabic is a lightweight utility mod designed to fix the way Arabic text is displayed in Minecraft. By default, many menus and textboxes break Arabic script into isolated, disconnected letters that are difficult to read. This mod introduces a custom shaping engine that automatically connects letters and ensures correct right-to-left (RTL) rendering.


هذا المود يجعل الكتابه بل عربي اسهل
